concept: Vibrant / Full of Energy / Intensely Alive
description: Full of energy and life; pulsing with vitality. 'Thurai' names the quality of heightened aliveness—colors that sing, beings that radiate energy, presence that fills and enlivens space.
sound_symbolism: The word pulses with energy. 'Thu' /θu/ begins with breath released, energy stirring. Then 'ra' radiates outward, vitality spreading. Finally 'i' rises with intensity, the vibrant peak.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'thurai loriphi' (vibrant rainbow). Stronger than 'lima' (alive)—implies intensity and radiance of life force.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Vibrant ecosystems indicate health—biodiversity and energy flow creating resilient, living communities.
pillars.art-nouveau-aesthetics: Vibrant colors and forms characterized Art Nouveau—life expressed at full intensity, nature's energy made visible.
